description_long: This is an L-shaped desk with a modern, minimalist design, featuring a spacious wooden surface supported by a black metal frame. The desk includes a main work area and a secondary return, providing ample space for multitasking or organizing office equipment. There is a visible cutout on the left side, likely for cable management, and a pull-out keyboard tray beneath the main surface. The desk also features a lower shelf for additional storage, suitable for books or small office accessories. The wood grain finish gives it a warm, professional appearance, while the metal legs ensure stability and durability. Its open frame design allows for comfortable legroom and easy access from multiple sides.
description: A modern L-shaped wooden desk with a black metal frame, featuring a pull-out keyboard tray, cable management cutout, and a lower storage shelf. The design is spacious and functional, ideal for office or home workspace use.
description_view_0: The desk is seen from the front-left, highlighting the pull-out keyboard tray, cable cutout, and lower shelf beneath the main surface.
description_view_1: This top-down right view emphasizes the expansive L-shaped work surface and the open frame structure, with the lower shelf visible on the right.
description_view_2: The rear view shows the full length of the desk, the solid wood back panel, and the supporting metal frame.
description_view_3: The front-right view displays the main work area, the keyboard tray, and the lower shelf, with the L-shape clearly visible.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the longer section with the pull-out keyboard tray and cable cutout, while the shorter return provides additional workspace to the right.
attribute_usage_context: computer workstation or office desk for multitasking and organization
